basic_details.job_title: NIMHANS Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) has released the official Project Associate 1 Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. NIMH/PROJ/SERB/PA-I/5448/NOTIF/2026-2027 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the NIMHANS Project Associate 1 Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 50 years with a postgraduate degree in Biomedical Sciences, Genetics, Human Genetics, Applied Genetics, Medical Genetics, Human Disease Genetics, or related areas, along with qualification through CSIR UGC-NET, GATE, or other national-level examinations,

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate in biomedical sciences, preferably genetics, human genetics, applied genetics, medical genetics, human disease genetics or related areas. Must be selected through National Eligibility Tests (CSIR UGC-NET including lectureship and GATE) or through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments.
qualification.details: Post graduate in biomedical sciences, preferably genetics, human genetics, applied genetics, medical genetics, human disease genetics or related areas from a recognized University or Institution. Must be selected through National Eligibility Tests (CSIR UGC-NET including lectureship and GATE) or through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc. Experience in genomics, Next-Generation Sequencing (NGS) (wet lab and/or bioinformatics) focused on Human Genetics and clinical applications.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- +24% HRA per month or Rs. 30,000/- + 24% HRA per month
salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- +24% HRA per month for Scholars who are selected through National Eligibility Tests- CSIR UGC-NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE or selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions. Rs. 30,000/- + 24% HRA per month for others who do not fall under the above category.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIMHANS Project Associate 1 Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIMHANS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIMHANS Project Associate 1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NIMHANS Project Associate 1 position is 13th June 2026. Ensure you apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate 1 post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a postgraduate degree in biomedical sciences, with a preference for genetics, human genetics, applied genetics, medical genetics, or human disease genetics. Additionally, selection through CSIR UGC-NET or GATE is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate 1 position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate 1 position is 50 years. There is no mention of a minimum age limit in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate 1 role?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 37,000/- + 24% HRA per month for those selected through national eligibility tests or national-level examinations. For others, it is Rs. 30,000/- + 24% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate 1 post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate 1 position at NIMHANS through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the NIMHANS Project Associate 1 recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate 1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a written test and/or interview, or a direct interview, depending on the number of eligible applicants and the discretion of the selection committee.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the NIMHANS Project Associate 1 recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates regarding application fees.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of experience is preferred for the Project Associate 1 role?
faq.answer: Experience in genomics, Next-Generation Sequencing (NGS) (wet lab and/or bioinformatics) focused on Human Genetics and clinical applications is preferred for this role.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
